metadata.title: Meezan Smart Remittance Wallet | Easy Remit | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Smart Remittance Wallet is a digital transformation for receiving home remittance in fast, secure and convenient manner. Smart Remittance Wallet is a unique wallet account with a saving facility.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Smart Remittance Wallet Open Smart Remittance Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Receive Remittance in Your Wallet & Stay Connected with Loved ones Smart Remittance Wallet is a digital transformation for receiving home remittance in fast, secure and convenient manner. Wallet is a unique wallet account with a saving facility. It allows our customers to receive remittance directly in their account and get free air time of PKR 2 against each dollar received. Smart Remittance Wallet also gives good profit rates on savings, with the flexibility to use the money at any time. Biometric facility will also allow customers to withdraw cash from Meezan Bank branches. The Smart Remittance Wallet holder can keep balance up to PKR 1.5 million. Terms and Conditions apply Smart Remittance Wallet can be opened in PKR only Outward Foreign remittances are not allowed from Smart Remittance Wallet Remittance Wallet can only be fed through home remittance, no other credits are allowed Debit cards issued on can only be used locally (PayPak Debit Cards) Key Features Instant account opening Instant account opening via biometric Free airtime Receive remittance and get free airtime of Rs. against each dollar Biometric scanning Cash withdrawal from any Meezan branch by biometric scanning Minimum deposit No requirement of minimum deposit Maximum balance Maximum balance worth PKR 1.5 million allowed Internet and Online Banking Free internet and mobile banking services Withdrawals No withholding tax on withdrawals Profit Monthly disbursement of profit Terms & Conditions Key Fact Statements (KFS) How the Smart Remittance Wallet Works? Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Smart Remittance Wallet holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool and funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Smart Remittance Wallet Monthly 0.46 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Remittance Wallet Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to Open Smart Remittance Wallet Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Get contacted by our representative! the form below and you'll be guided about how you can open your new account. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
